caption: A screen recording captures a digital workspace with a black background featuring a conceptual map of connected nodes. Various icons and text labels are visible, including "Muscle," "Cooking," "Knowledge," and "Flexible Thinking," with an illustration of a shopping cart labeled "SALT." A browser window is open at the top, showing several tabs such as "Trial & Learning by Systemic," "Knowledge by SystemicBio," and "Future of Society by Systemic." In the upper right corner, a small video feed displays a man wearing a dark hat and a dark shirt, who remains relatively still throughout the sequence. A sidebar on the right lists names including "Sarah Bedding" and "Sarah." Between the frames, there is very little movement; the layout of the conceptual map and the browser tabs remain static, while the man in the video feed makes slight adjustments to his position.
